---
title: "eQTL_setup"
author: "Colette Berg"
date: "2025-07-23"
output: html_document
---

## set up script and load required packages 
```{r setup, include=FALSE}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(MatrixEQTL)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(VariantAnnotation)
library(vcfR)
library(adegenet)
library(eQTLpipeline)
library(DESeq2)
library(viridis)
library(reshape2)
library(tidyr)
library(preprocessCore)


base.dir = find.package("MatrixEQTL")

```

# read in gene expression data, median filter, normalize, and split by population
# this is commented out now to save time
```{r gene expression read-in}
# trying a new tactic where I split expression data by population first, THEN do the filtering and normalization 
# commenting out the stuff below this for now 

# read in the raw data
expressionData <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/expression/switchgrass_diversityPanel_rawCounts.txt", sep="\t")


```

## transpose expression data, add SRR ID's & pop info
```{r transposing & adding SRR id's to the normalized data}

# editing to make it the raw counts data 
# setting the row names as gene names
rownames(expressionData) <- expressionData$GeneID

# transposing and removing the extra gene name column 
rawExp_transposed <- as.data.frame(t(dplyr::select(expressionData, -GeneID)))
              
# read in newer colData (with SRR ID's)
metadat <- read.csv("~/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/RNA_colData.csv")

# merging the metadata with the normalized expression data
exp_with_metadata <- cbind(metadat, rawExp_transposed)

```

## filter by population and site 
```{r split by site / pop}

MI_Atlantic <- filter(exp_with_metadata,
                      habitat == "M",
                      population == "Atlantic")

MI_Gulf <- filter(exp_with_metadata,
                      habitat == "M",
                      population == "Gulf")

MI_Midwest <- filter(exp_with_metadata,
                      habitat == "M",
                      population == "Midwest")

TX_Atlantic <- filter(exp_with_metadata,
                      habitat == "P",
                      population == "Atlantic")

TX_Gulf <- filter(exp_with_metadata,
                      habitat == "P",
                      population == "Gulf")

TX_Midwest <- filter(exp_with_metadata,
                      habitat == "P",
                      population == "Midwest")

```

# read in and format genotypes 
```{r format read counts to same order as genotypes}

# loading in the ordered SRR ID's for Midwest, Gulf, and Atlantic
Midwest_SRR <- read.csv("~/Dropbox/LowryLab/eQTL_mapping/Midwest.txt", 
                        header = FALSE,
                        row.names = NULL)
Gulf_SRR <- read.csv("~/Dropbox/LowryLab/eQTL_mapping/Gulf.txt", header = FALSE)
Atlantic_SRR <- read.csv("~/Dropbox/LowryLab/eQTL_mapping/Atlantic.txt", header = FALSE)

# adding an SR column for ease of merging
Midwest_SRR$SRR <- Midwest_SRR$V1
Gulf_SRR$SRR <- Gulf_SRR$V1
Atlantic_SRR$SRR <- Atlantic_SRR$V1

```

# merging and ordering (very long block)
```{r merging SRR ID's and gene expression files to order}

# now merging genotypes with ordered names. this can take a while...
MI_Midwest_ordered <- merge(Midwest_SRR, MI_Midwest, 
      by = "SRR",
      all.x = TRUE)

TX_Midwest_ordered <- merge(Midwest_SRR, TX_Midwest, 
      by = "SRR",
      all.x = TRUE)

MI_Gulf_ordered <- merge(Gulf_SRR, MI_Gulf, 
      by = "SRR",
      all.x = TRUE)

TX_Gulf_ordered <- merge(Gulf_SRR, TX_Gulf, 
      by = "SRR",
      all.x = TRUE)

MI_Atlantic_ordered <- merge(Atlantic_SRR, MI_Atlantic, 
      by = "SRR",
      all.x = TRUE)

TX_Atlantic_ordered <- merge(Atlantic_SRR, TX_Atlantic, 
      by = "SRR",
      all.x = TRUE)
```

# transposing ordered gene expression 
```{r format the gene expression files}
genes_MI_Midwest <- setNames(data.frame(t(dplyr::select(MI_Midwest_ordered, -V1, -X, -habitat, -population)[,-1])), MI_Midwest_ordered[,1])
genes_TX_Midwest <- setNames(data.frame(t(dplyr::select(TX_Midwest_ordered, -V1, -X, -habitat, -population)[,-1])), TX_Midwest_ordered[,1])

genes_MI_Atlantic <- setNames(data.frame(t(dplyr::select(MI_Atlantic_ordered, -V1, -X, -habitat, -population)[,-1])), MI_Atlantic_ordered[,1])
genes_TX_Atlantic <- setNames(data.frame(t(dplyr::select(TX_Atlantic_ordered, -V1, -X, -habitat, -population)[,-1])), TX_Atlantic_ordered[,1])

genes_MI_Gulf <- setNames(data.frame(t(dplyr::select(MI_Gulf_ordered, -V1, -X, -habitat, -population)[,-1])), MI_Gulf_ordered[,1])
genes_TX_Gulf <- setNames(data.frame(t(dplyr::select(TX_Gulf_ordered, -V1, -X, -habitat, -population)[,-1])), TX_Gulf_ordered[,1])

```

# normalizing and filtering on a per-pop + habitat basis
```{r per-pop filt and normalizing. }

# median filter, normalize, and format gene expression

# TX_Midwest
genes_TX_Midwest$row_median <- apply(genes_TX_Midwest, 1, median, na.rm=TRUE) # median filtering step 1
genes_TX_Midwest_medFilt <- dplyr::filter(genes_TX_Midwest, row_median>3) # median filtering step 2
genes_TX_Midwest_log2 <- log2(dplyr::select(genes_TX_Midwest_medFilt, -row_median) + 1) # log2 transform genes 
genes_TX_Midwest_quantNorm <- as.data.frame(normalize.quantiles(as.matrix(t(genes_TX_Midwest_log2)))) # quant normalize log-transformed genes 
rownames(genes_TX_Midwest_quantNorm) <- colnames(dplyr::select(genes_TX_Midwest_medFilt, -row_median)) # set rownames
colnames(genes_TX_Midwest_quantNorm) <- rownames(genes_TX_Midwest_medFilt) # set colnames 
genes_TX_MidwestNorm <- as.data.frame(t(genes_TX_Midwest_quantNorm)) # transpose

# TX_Gulf
genes_TX_Gulf$row_median <- apply(genes_TX_Gulf, 1, median, na.rm=TRUE) # median filtering step 1
genes_TX_Gulf_medFilt <- dplyr::filter(genes_TX_Gulf, row_median>3) # median filtering step 2
genes_TX_Gulf_log2 <- log2(dplyr::select(genes_TX_Gulf_medFilt, -row_median) + 1) # log2 transform genes 
genes_TX_Gulf_quantNorm <- as.data.frame(normalize.quantiles(as.matrix(t(genes_TX_Gulf_log2)))) # quant normalize log-transformed genes 
rownames(genes_TX_Gulf_quantNorm) <- colnames(dplyr::select(genes_TX_Gulf_medFilt, -row_median)) # set rownames
colnames(genes_TX_Gulf_quantNorm) <- rownames(genes_TX_Gulf_medFilt) # set colnames 
genes_TX_GulfNorm <- as.data.frame(t(genes_TX_Gulf_quantNorm)) # transpose

# TX_Atlantic
genes_TX_Atlantic$row_median <- apply(genes_TX_Atlantic, 1, median, na.rm=TRUE) # median filtering step 1
genes_TX_Atlantic_medFilt <- dplyr::filter(genes_TX_Atlantic, row_median>3) # median filtering step 2
genes_TX_Atlantic_log2 <- log2(dplyr::select(genes_TX_Atlantic_medFilt, -row_median) + 1) # log2 transform genes 
genes_TX_Atlantic_quantNorm <- as.data.frame(normalize.quantiles(as.matrix(t(genes_TX_Atlantic_log2)))) # quant normalize log-transformed genes 
rownames(genes_TX_Atlantic_quantNorm) <- colnames(dplyr::select(genes_TX_Atlantic_medFilt, -row_median)) # set rownames
colnames(genes_TX_Atlantic_quantNorm) <- rownames(genes_TX_Atlantic_medFilt) # set colnames 
genes_TX_AtlanticNorm <- as.data.frame(t(genes_TX_Atlantic_quantNorm)) # transpose

# MI_Midwest
genes_MI_Midwest$row_median <- apply(genes_MI_Midwest, 1, median, na.rm=TRUE) # median filtering step 1
genes_MI_Midwest_medFilt <- dplyr::filter(genes_MI_Midwest, row_median>3) # median filtering step 2
genes_MI_Midwest_log2 <- log2(dplyr::select(genes_MI_Midwest_medFilt, -row_median) + 1) # log2 transform genes 
genes_MI_Midwest_quantNorm <- as.data.frame(normalize.quantiles(as.matrix(t(genes_MI_Midwest_log2)))) # quant normalize log-transformed genes 
rownames(genes_MI_Midwest_quantNorm) <- colnames(dplyr::select(genes_MI_Midwest_medFilt, -row_median)) # set rownames
colnames(genes_MI_Midwest_quantNorm) <- rownames(genes_MI_Midwest_medFilt) # set colnames 
genes_MI_MidwestNorm <- as.data.frame(t(genes_MI_Midwest_quantNorm)) # transpose

# MI_Gulf
genes_MI_Gulf$row_median <- apply(genes_MI_Gulf, 1, median, na.rm=TRUE) # median filtering step 1
genes_MI_Gulf_medFilt <- dplyr::filter(genes_MI_Gulf, row_median>3) # median filtering step 2
genes_MI_Gulf_log2 <- log2(dplyr::select(genes_MI_Gulf_medFilt, -row_median) + 1) # log2 transform genes 
genes_MI_Gulf_quantNorm <- as.data.frame(normalize.quantiles(as.matrix(t(genes_MI_Gulf_log2)))) # quant normalize log-transformed genes 
rownames(genes_MI_Gulf_quantNorm) <- colnames(dplyr::select(genes_MI_Gulf_medFilt, -row_median)) # set rownames
colnames(genes_MI_Gulf_quantNorm) <- rownames(genes_MI_Gulf_medFilt) # set colnames 
genes_MI_GulfNorm <- as.data.frame(t(genes_MI_Gulf_quantNorm)) # transpose

# MI_Atlantic
genes_MI_Atlantic$row_median <- apply(genes_MI_Atlantic, 1, median, na.rm=TRUE) # median filtering step 1
genes_MI_Atlantic_medFilt <- dplyr::filter(genes_MI_Atlantic, row_median>3) # median filtering step 2
genes_MI_Atlantic_log2 <- log2(dplyr::select(genes_MI_Atlantic_medFilt, -row_median) + 1) # log2 transform genes 
genes_MI_Atlantic_quantNorm <- as.data.frame(normalize.quantiles(as.matrix(t(genes_MI_Atlantic_log2)))) # quant normalize log-transformed genes 
rownames(genes_MI_Atlantic_quantNorm) <- colnames(dplyr::select(genes_MI_Atlantic_medFilt, -row_median)) # set rownames
colnames(genes_MI_Atlantic_quantNorm) <- rownames(genes_MI_Atlantic_medFilt) # set colnames 
genes_MI_AtlanticNorm <- as.data.frame(t(genes_MI_Atlantic_quantNorm)) # transpose

```

# now subtracting MI / TX to get the GxE values 
```{r subtracting for GxE}

# first filtering to the genes common to the two normalized datasets
Midwest_GxE_geneList <- intersect(rownames(genes_MI_MidwestNorm), rownames(genes_TX_MidwestNorm))
Gulf_GxE_geneList <- intersect(rownames(genes_MI_GulfNorm), rownames(genes_TX_GulfNorm))
Atlantic_GxE_geneList <- intersect(rownames(genes_MI_AtlanticNorm), rownames(genes_TX_AtlanticNorm))

# filter by gene list
# Midwest
filtered_MI_Midwest <- genes_MI_MidwestNorm %>% filter(rownames(genes_MI_MidwestNorm) %in% Midwest_GxE_geneList)
filtered_TX_Midwest <- genes_TX_MidwestNorm %>% filter(rownames(genes_TX_MidwestNorm) %in% Midwest_GxE_geneList)

# Gulf
filtered_MI_Gulf <- genes_MI_GulfNorm %>% filter(rownames(genes_MI_GulfNorm) %in% Gulf_GxE_geneList)
filtered_TX_Gulf <- genes_TX_GulfNorm %>% filter(rownames(genes_TX_GulfNorm) %in% Gulf_GxE_geneList)

# Atlantic
filtered_MI_Atlantic <- genes_MI_AtlanticNorm %>% filter(rownames(genes_MI_AtlanticNorm) %in% Atlantic_GxE_geneList)
filtered_TX_Atlantic <- genes_TX_AtlanticNorm %>% filter(rownames(genes_TX_AtlanticNorm) %in% Atlantic_GxE_geneList)

# subtract
genes_GxE_Midwest <- filtered_MI_Midwest - filtered_TX_Midwest 
genes_GxE_Atlantic <-  filtered_MI_Atlantic - filtered_TX_Atlantic
genes_GxE_Gulf <-  filtered_MI_Gulf - filtered_TX_Gulf

# filtering GxE files by median difference in gene expression between TX and MI

genes_GxE_Midwest$row_median <- apply(genes_GxE_Midwest, 1, median, na.rm=TRUE)
genes_GxE_Gulf$row_median <- apply(genes_GxE_Gulf, 1, median, na.rm=TRUE)
genes_GxE_Atlantic$row_median <- apply(genes_GxE_Atlantic, 1, median, na.rm=TRUE)

# filter
genes_GxE_Midwest_filt <- dplyr::filter(genes_GxE_Midwest, row_median > 0)
genes_GxE_Gulf_filt <- dplyr::filter(genes_GxE_Gulf, row_median > 0)
genes_GxE_Atlantic_filt <- dplyr::filter(genes_GxE_Atlantic, row_median > 0)
```

# writing the gene expression files
```{r writing gene expression files}
write.csv(genes_MI_MidwestNorm, "~/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/expression/genes_MI_Midwest.csv")
write.csv(genes_MI_GulfNorm, "~/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/expression/genes_MI_Gulf.csv")
write.csv(genes_MI_AtlanticNorm, "~/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/expression/genes_MI_Atlantic.csv")

write.csv(genes_TX_MidwestNorm, "~/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/expression/genes_TX_Midwest.csv")
write.csv(genes_TX_GulfNorm, "~/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/expression/genes_TX_Gulf.csv")
write.csv(genes_TX_AtlanticNorm, "~/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/expression/genes_TX_Atlantic.csv")

write.csv(dplyr::select(genes_GxE_Midwest_filt, -row_median), "~/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/expression/genes_GxE_Midwest_filt.csv")
write.csv(dplyr::select(genes_GxE_Gulf_filt, -row_median), "~/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/expression/genes_GxE_Gulf_filt.csv")
write.csv(dplyr::select(genes_GxE_Atlantic_filt, -row_median), "~/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/expression/genes_GxE_Atlantic_filt.csv")

```


## setting up matrix eQTL settings
```{r matrix eQTL settings, echo=FALSE}

# setting up matrix eQTL settings
useModel = modelLINEAR; # modelANOVA or modelLINEAR or modelLINEAR_CROSS
output_file_name = tempfile();
errorCovariance = numeric();

```

## read in gene expression data. if you've already formatted / written the gene expression files, you can start here
```{r expression, message = FALSE}

# reading in gene expression data for Midwest, Gulf, and Atlantic 

# MI_Midwest
geneMI_Midwest = SlicedData$new()
geneMI_Midwest$fileDelimiter = ",";    
geneMI_Midwest$LoadFile("~/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/expression/genes_MI_Midwest.csv")

# TX_Midwest 
geneTX_Midwest = SlicedData$new()
geneTX_Midwest$fileDelimiter = ",";    
geneTX_Midwest$LoadFile("~/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/expression/genes_TX_Midwest.csv")

# GxE_Midwest
geneGxE_Midwest = SlicedData$new()
geneGxE_Midwest$fileDelimiter = ",";    
geneGxE_Midwest$LoadFile("~/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/expression/genes_GxE_Midwest_filt.csv")

# MI_Gulf
geneMI_Gulf = SlicedData$new()
geneMI_Gulf$fileDelimiter = ",";    
geneMI_Gulf$LoadFile("~/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/expression/genes_MI_Gulf.csv")

# TX_Gulf 
geneTX_Gulf = SlicedData$new()
geneTX_Gulf$fileDelimiter = ",";    
geneTX_Gulf$LoadFile("~/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/expression/genes_TX_Gulf.csv")

# GxE_Gulf
geneGxE_Gulf = SlicedData$new()
geneGxE_Gulf$fileDelimiter = ",";    
geneGxE_Gulf$LoadFile("~/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/expression/genes_GxE_Gulf_filt.csv")

# MI_Atlantic
geneMI_Atlantic = SlicedData$new()
geneMI_Atlantic$fileDelimiter = ",";    
geneMI_Atlantic$LoadFile("~/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/expression/genes_MI_Atlantic.csv")

# TX_Atlantic 
geneTX_Atlantic = SlicedData$new()
geneTX_Atlantic$fileDelimiter = ",";    
geneTX_Atlantic$LoadFile("~/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/expression/genes_TX_Atlantic.csv")

# GxE_Atlantic
geneGxE_Atlantic = SlicedData$new()
geneGxE_Atlantic$fileDelimiter = ",";    
geneGxE_Atlantic$LoadFile("~/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/expression/genes_GxE_Atlantic_filt.csv")



```

## read in gene location and snp location file 
```{r snps_genes}

# gene name, chromosome, start, stop
gene_location_file_name = "~/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/AP13/AP13_gene_position.txt"

# snp name, chromosome, position (bp)
snps_location_file_name = "~/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/positions.txt"

# process smps
snpspos = read.table(snps_location_file_name, 
                     header = FALSE, 
                     stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
                     sep="\t")

# process gene names 
genepos = read.table(gene_location_file_name, 
                     header = TRUE, 
                     stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
                     sep="\t")

```

## format and write the covariates files. if you've already done this you can skip it
```{r covariates formatting}

# read in the PCA eigenvectors produced by plink
Midwest_eigen <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/genotypes/Midwest_allChroms.eigenvec", sep="\t")
Gulf_eigen <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/genotypes/Gulf_allChroms.eigenvec", sep="\t")
Atlantic_eigen <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/genotypes/Atlantic_allChroms.eigenvec", sep="\t")

# format the covariates
Midwest_cov <- setNames(data.frame(t(dplyr::select(Midwest_eigen, X.IID, PC1, PC2, PC3, PC4, PC5)[,-1])), Midwest_eigen[,1])
Gulf_cov <- setNames(data.frame(t(dplyr::select(Gulf_eigen, X.IID, PC1, PC2, PC3, PC4, PC5)[,-1])), Gulf_eigen[,1])
Atlantic_cov <- setNames(data.frame(t(dplyr::select(Atlantic_eigen, X.IID, PC1, PC2, PC3, PC4, PC5)[,-1])), Atlantic_eigen[,1])

# write the covariate files to an appropriate place 
write.csv(Midwest_cov, "~/Dropbox/lowryLab/data/expression/cov_allChroms_Midwest.csv")
write.csv(Gulf_cov, "~/Dropbox/lowryLab/data/expression/cov_allChroms_Gulf.csv")
write.csv(Atlantic_cov, "~/Dropbox/lowryLab/data/expression/cov_allChroms_Atlantic.csv")

```

## read in the covariates file
```{r covariates}

## Load covariates file, Midwest. in this case it's the first 5 PC's (plink)

cvrt_Midwest = SlicedData$new();
cvrt_Midwest$fileDelimiter = ",";      # the TAB character
cvrt_Midwest$fileOmitCharacters = "NA"; # denote missing values;
cvrt_Midwest$fileSkipRows = 1;          # one row of column labels
cvrt_Midwest$fileSkipColumns = 1;       # one column of row labels
cvrt_Midwest$LoadFile("~/Dropbox/lowryLab/data/expression/cov_allChroms_Midwest.csv");

## Load covariates file, Gulf. in this case it's the first 5 PC's (plink)

cvrt_Gulf = SlicedData$new();
cvrt_Gulf$fileDelimiter = ",";      # the TAB character
cvrt_Gulf$fileOmitCharacters = "NA"; # denote missing values;
cvrt_Gulf$fileSkipRows = 1;          # one row of column labels
cvrt_Gulf$fileSkipColumns = 1;       # one column of row labels
cvrt_Gulf$LoadFile("~/Dropbox/lowryLab/data/expression/cov_allChroms_Gulf.csv");


## Load covariates file, Atlantic. in this case it's the first 5 PC's (plink)

cvrt_Atlantic = SlicedData$new();
cvrt_Atlantic$fileDelimiter = ",";      # the TAB character
cvrt_Atlantic$fileOmitCharacters = "NA"; # denote missing values;
cvrt_Atlantic$fileSkipRows = 1;          # one row of column labels
cvrt_Atlantic$fileSkipColumns = 1;       # one column of row labels
cvrt_Atlantic$LoadFile("~/Dropbox/lowryLab/data/expression/cov_allChroms_Atlantic.csv");


```

## read in Midwest genotypes 
```{r read in genotypes, Midwest}

# reading in the data first 

# 1K
Midwest_chrom1K = "~/Dropbox/lowryLab/data/genotypes/Midwest_1K_hetFilt.txt"

# loading genotype data 
Midwest_allsnps_1K = SlicedData$new();
Midwest_allsnps_1K$fileDelimiter = "\t";       # denote missing values;
Midwest_allsnps_1K$fileSkipColumns = 1;          # one column of row labels
Midwest_allsnps_1K$fileSliceSize = 10000;      # read file in pieces of 2,000 rows
Midwest_allsnps_1K$LoadFile(Midwest_chrom1K)

# map eQTLs, MI Midwest 
```{r run matrix eQTL, MI Midwest}


# eQTL_1K
me_MI_Midwest_1K = Matrix_eQTL_main(
  snps = Midwest_allsnps_1K,
  gene = geneMI_Midwest,
  snpspos = snpspos,
  genepos = genepos,
  cisDist = 1e6,
  cvrt = cvrt_Midwest,
  output_file_name = "/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/MI_Midwest_1K.txt",
  output_file_name.cis = "/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/MI_Midwest_1K_cis.txt",
  pvOutputThreshold = 1e-6,
  pvOutputThreshold.cis = 1e-2, 
  useModel = useModel,
  errorCovariance = errorCovariance,
  verbose = TRUE,
  pvalue.hist = "qqplot",
  min.pv.by.genesnp = TRUE,
  noFDRsaveMemory = FALSE)


# eQTL_1N
me_MI_Midwest_1N = Matrix_eQTL_main(
  snps = Midwest_allsnps_1N,
  gene = geneMI_Midwest,
  cvrt = cvrt_Midwest,
  snpspos = snpspos,
  genepos = genepos,
  cisDist = 1e6,
  output_file_name = "/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/MI_Midwest_1N.txt",
  output_file_name.cis = "/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/MI_Midwest_1N_cis.txt",
  pvOutputThreshold = 1e-6,
  pvOutputThreshold.cis = 1e-2, 
  useModel = useModel,
  errorCovariance = errorCovariance,
  verbose = TRUE,
  pvalue.hist = "qqplot",
  min.pv.by.genesnp = TRUE,
  noFDRsaveMemory = FALSE)

# eQTL_2K
me_MI_Midwest_2K = Matrix_eQTL_main(
  snps = Midwest_allsnps_2K,
  gene = geneMI_Midwest,
  cvrt = cvrt_Midwest,
  snpspos = snpspos,
  genepos = genepos,
  cisDist = 1e6,
  output_file_name = "/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/MI_Midwest_2K.txt",

# eQTL_1K
me_GxE_Gulf_1K = Matrix_eQTL_main(

## process the eQTLs

# load in the gene positions

```{r load and label the gene positions for post processing}
# read in and process gene position file
genePos <- read.csv("~/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/AP13/AP13_gene_position.txt",
                    sep="\t")

# format (add gene column) for later
genePos$gene <- genePos$geneid



```

# read back in the eQTLs for post-processing, GxE Midwest

```{r GxE Midwest post processing}

# read in the trans eQTL output 
Chr01K_trans <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_1K.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr01N_trans <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_1N.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr02K_trans <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_2K.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr02N_trans <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_2N.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr03K_trans <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_3K.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr03N_trans <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_3N.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr04K_trans <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_4K.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr04N_trans <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_4N.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr05K_trans <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_5K.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr05N_trans <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_5N.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr06K_trans <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_6K.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr06N_trans <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_6N.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr07K_trans <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_7K.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr07N_trans <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_7N.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr08K_trans <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_8K.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr08N_trans <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_8N.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr09K_trans <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_9K.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr09N_trans <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_9N.txt", sep = "\t")

# read in the cis eQTL output
Chr01K_cis <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_1K_cis.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr01N_cis <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_1N_cis.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr02K_cis <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_2K_cis.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr02N_cis <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_2N_cis.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr03K_cis <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_3K_cis.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr03N_cis <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_3N_cis.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr04K_cis <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_4K_cis.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr04N_cis <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_4N_cis.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr05K_cis <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_5K_cis.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr05N_cis <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_5N_cis.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr06K_cis <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_6K_cis.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr06N_cis <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_6N_cis.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr07K_cis <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_7K_cis.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr07N_cis <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_7N_cis.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr08K_cis <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_8K_cis.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr08N_cis <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_8N_cis.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr09K_cis <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_9K_cis.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr09N_cis <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_9N_cis.txt", sep = "\t")



# adding all the cis-eQTLs into a list 
allCis <- rbind(Chr01K_cis,
      Chr01N_cis,
      Chr02K_cis,
      Chr02N_cis,
      Chr03K_cis,
      Chr03N_cis,
      Chr04K_cis,
      Chr04N_cis,
      Chr05K_cis,
      Chr05N_cis,
      Chr06K_cis,
      Chr06N_cis,
      Chr07K_cis,
      Chr07N_cis,
      Chr08K_cis,
      Chr08N_cis,
      Chr09K_cis,
      Chr09N_cis)

# add cis label to column
allCis$type <- "cis"

# merge 'em 
cis_labeled <- merge(allCis, genePos, by="gene")


# adding gene position to the trans files 
Chr01K_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr01K_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr01N_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr01N_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr02K_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr02K_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr02N_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr02N_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr03K_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr03K_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr03N_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr03N_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr04K_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr04K_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr04N_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr04N_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr05K_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr05K_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr05N_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr05N_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr06K_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr06K_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr06N_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr06N_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr07K_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr07K_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr07N_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr07N_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr08K_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr08K_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr08N_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr08N_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr09K_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr09K_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr09N_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr09N_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))


# paste all the trans eQTLs together
alltrans_labeled <- rbind(Chr01K_trans_labeled,
                  Chr01N_trans_labeled,
                  Chr02K_trans_labeled,
                  Chr02N_trans_labeled,
                  Chr03K_trans_labeled,
                  Chr03N_trans_labeled,
                  Chr04K_trans_labeled,
                  Chr04N_trans_labeled,
                  Chr05K_trans_labeled,
                  Chr05N_trans_labeled,
                  Chr06K_trans_labeled,
                  Chr06N_trans_labeled,
                  Chr07K_trans_labeled,
                  Chr07N_trans_labeled,
                  Chr08K_trans_labeled,
                  Chr08N_trans_labeled,
                  Chr09K_trans_labeled,
                  Chr09N_trans_labeled)

# add trans label column
alltrans_labeled$type <- "trans"

# put the cis and trans together! 
all_eQTLs <- rbind(cis_labeled, alltrans_labeled)

# now separate the SNP label for plotting
Midwest_GxE_eQTLs <- all_eQTLs %>%
  separate(SNP, into = c("genome_Chrom", "genome_bp"), sep = "_")

# write all eQTls to save them

write.csv(Midwest_GxE_eQTLs, "/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Midwest_all_eQTLs.csv")
```

Chr01N_cis <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Gulf_1N_cis.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr02K_cis <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Gulf_2K_cis.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr02N_cis <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Gulf_2N_cis.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr03K_cis <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Gulf_3K_cis.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr03N_cis <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Gulf_3N_cis.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr04K_cis <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Gulf_4K_cis.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr04N_cis <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Gulf_4N_cis.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr05K_cis <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Gulf_5K_cis.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr05N_cis <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Gulf_5N_cis.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr06K_cis <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Gulf_6K_cis.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr06N_cis <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Gulf_6N_cis.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr07K_cis <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Gulf_7K_cis.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr07N_cis <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Gulf_7N_cis.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr08K_cis <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Gulf_8K_cis.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr08N_cis <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Gulf_8N_cis.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr09K_cis <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Gulf_9K_cis.txt", sep = "\t")
Chr09N_cis <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Gulf_9N_cis.txt", sep = "\t")



# adding all the cis-eQTLs into a list 
allCis <- rbind(Chr01K_cis,
      Chr01N_cis,
      Chr02K_cis,
      Chr02N_cis,
      Chr03K_cis,
      Chr03N_cis,
      Chr04K_cis,
      Chr04N_cis,
      Chr05K_cis,
      Chr05N_cis,
      Chr06K_cis,
      Chr06N_cis,
      Chr07K_cis,
      Chr07N_cis,
      Chr08K_cis,
      Chr08N_cis,
      Chr09K_cis,
      Chr09N_cis)

# add cis label to column
allCis$type <- "cis"

# merge 'em 
cis_labeled <- merge(allCis, genePos, by="gene")


# adding gene position to the trans files 
Chr01K_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr01K_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr01N_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr01N_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr02K_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr02K_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr02N_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr02N_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr03K_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr03K_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr03N_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr03N_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr04K_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr04K_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr04N_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr04N_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr05K_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr05K_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr05N_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr05N_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr06K_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr06K_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr06N_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr06N_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr07K_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr07K_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr07N_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr07N_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr08K_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr08K_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr08N_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr08N_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr09K_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr09K_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr09N_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr09N_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))


# paste all the trans eQTLs together
alltrans_labeled <- rbind(Chr01K_trans_labeled,
                  Chr01N_trans_labeled,
                  Chr02K_trans_labeled,
                  Chr02N_trans_labeled,
                  Chr03K_trans_labeled,
                  Chr03N_trans_labeled,
                  Chr04K_trans_labeled,
                  Chr04N_trans_labeled,
                  Chr05K_trans_labeled,
                  Chr05N_trans_labeled,
                  Chr06K_trans_labeled,
                  Chr06N_trans_labeled,
                  Chr07K_trans_labeled,
                  Chr07N_trans_labeled,
                  Chr08K_trans_labeled,
                  Chr08N_trans_labeled,
                  Chr09K_trans_labeled,
                  Chr09N_trans_labeled)

# add trans label column
alltrans_labeled$type <- "trans"

# put the cis and trans together! 
all_eQTLs <- rbind(cis_labeled, alltrans_labeled)

# now separate the SNP label for plotting
Gulf_GxE_eQTLs <- all_eQTLs %>%
  separate(SNP, into = c("genome_Chrom", "genome_bp"), sep = "_")

# write all eQTls to save them

write.csv(Gulf_GxE_eQTLs, "/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/GxE_Gulf_all_eQTLs.csv")
```

Midwest_MI_eQTLs <- all_eQTLs %>%
  separate(SNP, into = c("genome_Chrom", "genome_bp"), sep = "_")

# write all eQTls to save them

write.csv(Midwest_MI_eQTLs, "/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/MI_Midwest_all_eQTLs.csv")
```

Chr09N_cis <- read.csv("/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/MI_Gulf_9N_cis.txt", sep = "\t")



# adding all the cis-eQTLs into a list 
allCis <- rbind(Chr01K_cis,
      Chr01N_cis,
      Chr02K_cis,
      Chr02N_cis,
      Chr03K_cis,
      Chr03N_cis,
      Chr04K_cis,
      Chr04N_cis,
      Chr05K_cis,
      Chr05N_cis,
      Chr06K_cis,
      Chr06N_cis,
      Chr07K_cis,
      Chr07N_cis,
      Chr08K_cis,
      Chr08N_cis,
      Chr09K_cis,
      Chr09N_cis)

# add cis label to column
allCis$type <- "cis"

# merge 'em 
cis_labeled <- merge(allCis, genePos, by="gene")


# adding gene position to the trans files 
Chr01K_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr01K_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr01N_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr01N_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr02K_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr02K_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))

Chr05K_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr05K_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr05N_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr05N_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr06K_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr06K_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr06N_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr06N_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr07K_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr07K_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr07N_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr07N_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr08K_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr08K_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr08N_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr08N_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr09K_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr09K_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr09N_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr09N_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))


# paste all the trans eQTLs together
alltrans_labeled <- rbind(Chr01K_trans_labeled,
                  Chr01N_trans_labeled,
                  Chr02K_trans_labeled,
                  Chr02N_trans_labeled,
                  Chr03K_trans_labeled,
                  Chr03N_trans_labeled,
                  Chr04K_trans_labeled,
                  Chr04N_trans_labeled,
                  Chr05K_trans_labeled,
                  Chr05N_trans_labeled,
                  Chr06K_trans_labeled,
                  Chr06N_trans_labeled,
                  Chr07K_trans_labeled,
                  Chr07N_trans_labeled,
                  Chr08K_trans_labeled,
                  Chr08N_trans_labeled,
                  Chr09K_trans_labeled,
                  Chr09N_trans_labeled)

# add trans label column
alltrans_labeled$type <- "trans"

# put the cis and trans together! 
all_eQTLs <- rbind(cis_labeled, alltrans_labeled)

# now separate the SNP label for plotting
Gulf_MI_eQTLs <- all_eQTLs %>%
  separate(SNP, into = c("genome_Chrom", "genome_bp"), sep = "_")

# write all eQTls to save them

write.csv(Gulf_MI_eQTLs, "/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/MI_Gulf_all_eQTLs_hetFilt.csv")

      Chr02N_cis,
      Chr03K_cis,
      Chr03N_cis,
      Chr04K_cis,
      Chr04N_cis,
      Chr05K_cis,
      Chr05N_cis,
      Chr06K_cis,
      Chr06N_cis,
      Chr07K_cis,
      Chr07N_cis,
      Chr08K_cis,
      Chr08N_cis,
      Chr09K_cis,
      Chr09N_cis)

# add cis label to column
allCis$type <- "cis"

# merge 'em 
cis_labeled <- merge(allCis, genePos, by="gene")


# adding gene position to the trans files 
Chr01K_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr01K_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr01N_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr01N_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr02K_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr02K_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr02N_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr02N_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr03K_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr03K_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr03N_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr03N_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr04K_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr04K_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr04N_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr04N_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr05K_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr05K_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr05N_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr05N_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr06K_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr06K_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr06N_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr06N_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr07K_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr07K_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr07N_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr07N_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr08K_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr08K_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr08N_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr08N_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr09K_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr09K_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))
Chr09N_trans_labeled <- merge(Chr09N_trans, genePos, id.vars = c("gene"))


# paste all the trans eQTLs together
alltrans_labeled <- rbind(Chr01K_trans_labeled,
                  Chr01N_trans_labeled,
                  Chr02K_trans_labeled,
                  Chr02N_trans_labeled,
                  Chr03K_trans_labeled,
                  Chr03N_trans_labeled,
                  Chr04K_trans_labeled,
                  Chr04N_trans_labeled,
                  Chr05K_trans_labeled,
                  Chr05N_trans_labeled,
                  Chr06K_trans_labeled,
                  Chr06N_trans_labeled,
                  Chr07K_trans_labeled,
                  Chr07N_trans_labeled,
                  Chr08K_trans_labeled,
                  Chr08N_trans_labeled,
                  Chr09K_trans_labeled,
                  Chr09N_trans_labeled)

# add trans label column
alltrans_labeled$type <- "trans"

# put the cis and trans together! 
all_eQTLs <- rbind(cis_labeled, alltrans_labeled)

# now separate the SNP label for plotting
Midwest_TX_eQTLs <- all_eQTLs %>%
  separate(SNP, into = c("genome_Chrom", "genome_bp"), sep = "_")

# write all eQTls to save them

write.csv(Midwest_TX_eQTLs, "/Users/coletteberg/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/TX_Midwest_all_eQTLs.csv")
```

# filtering, Gulf MI
```{r spurious gene filtering, Gulf MI}

# identifying genes to be filtered out (too many spurious trans-eQTLs)
summarize_Gulf_MI <- filter(Gulf_MI_eQTLs,
                                         FDR < 0.1) %>% 
  group_by(geneid) %>% 
  summarise(n = n())


# only keeping trans eGenes with less than 25 eQTLs
Gulf_MI_transFilt <- filter(Gulf_MI_eQTLs, 
       type == "trans",
       FDR < 0.1,
       gene %in% filter(summarize_Gulf_MI, n < 25)$geneid)

# keeping all cis eQTls that fit FDR corrections 
Gulf_MI_cisFilt <- filter(Gulf_MI_eQTLs, 
       type == "cis",
       FDR < 0.1)

# adding them together
Gulf_MI_eQTLs_filt <- rbind(Gulf_MI_transFilt,
                                Gulf_MI_cisFilt)


Gulf_MI_eQTLs_filt$chr <- factor(Gulf_MI_eQTLs_filt$chr,
                                         levels = c("Chr09N",
                                                    "Chr09K",
                                                    "Chr08N",
                                                    "Chr08K",
                                                    "Chr07N",
                                                    "Chr07K",
                                                    "Chr06N",
                                                    "Chr06K",
                                                    "Chr05N",
                                                    "Chr05K",
                                                    "Chr04N",
                                                    "Chr04K",
                                                    "Chr03N",
                                                    "Chr03K",
                                                    "Chr02N",
                                                    "Chr02K",
                                                    "Chr01N",
                                                    "Chr01K"))


ggplot(Gulf_MI_eQTLs_filt,
       aes(y = as.numeric(s1)/1000000,
           x = as.numeric(genome_bp)/1000000,
           col = -log10(p.value))) + #alpha = -log10(p.value))) +
  facet_grid(chr ~ genome_Chrom,
             scale = "free",
             space = "free") + 
  theme_bw() +
  theme(strip.background = element_rect(fill="white"),
        panel.spacing = unit(0, "lines"),
        legend.position = "none",
        panel.grid = element_blank()) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_color_viridis() + 
  ggtitle("Gulf eQTLs, MI")


write.csv(Gulf_MI_eQTLs_filt, "~/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/Gulf_MI_eQTLs_filt.csv")

```

# filtering & output, Gulf TX
```{r spurious gene filtering, Gulf TX}

# identifying genes to be filtered out (too many spurious trans-eQTLs)
summarize_Gulf_TX <- filter(Gulf_TX_eQTLs,
                                         FDR < 0.1) %>% 
  group_by(geneid) %>% 
  summarise(n = n())


# only keeping trans eGenes with less than 25 eQTLs
Gulf_TX_transFilt <- filter(Gulf_TX_eQTLs, 
       type == "trans",
       FDR < 0.1,
       gene %in% filter(summarize_Gulf_TX, n < 25)$geneid)

# keeping all cis eQTls that fit FDR corrections 
Gulf_TX_cisFilt <- filter(Gulf_TX_eQTLs, 
       type == "cis",
       FDR < 0.1)

# adding them together
Gulf_TX_eQTLs_filt <- rbind(Gulf_TX_transFilt,
                            Gulf_TX_cisFilt)


Gulf_TX_eQTLs_filt$chr <- factor(Gulf_TX_eQTLs_filt$chr,
                                         levels = c("Chr09N",
                                                    "Chr09K",
                                                    "Chr08N",
                                                    "Chr08K",
                                                    "Chr07N",
                                                    "Chr07K",
                                                    "Chr06N",
                                                    "Chr06K",
                                                    "Chr05N",
                                                    "Chr05K",
                                                    "Chr04N",
                                                    "Chr04K",
                                                    "Chr03N",
                                                    "Chr03K",
                                                    "Chr02N",
                                                    "Chr02K",
                                                    "Chr01N",
                                                    "Chr01K"))


ggplot(Gulf_TX_eQTLs_filt,
       aes(y = as.numeric(s1)/1000000,
           x = as.numeric(genome_bp)/1000000,
           col = -log10(p.value))) + #alpha = -log10(p.value))) +
  facet_grid(chr ~ genome_Chrom,
             scale = "free",
             space = "free") + 
  theme_bw() +
  theme(strip.background = element_rect(fill="white"),
        panel.spacing = unit(0, "lines"),
        legend.position = "none",
        panel.grid = element_blank()) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_color_viridis() + 
  ggtitle("Gulf eQTLs, TX")

write.csv(Gulf_TX_eQTLs_filt, "~/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/Gulf_TX_eQTLs_filt.csv")

```

##  meta-analyses of the filtered eQTLs 

# first just counting up the types of each eQTL
```{r making table of # of cis / trans eQTLs }

filter(Atlantic_MI_eQTLs_filt, type == "cis")
length(unique(filter(Atlantic_MI_eQTLs_filt, type == "cis")$gene))

filter(Atlantic_MI_eQTLs_filt, type == "trans")
length(unique(filter(Atlantic_MI_eQTLs_filt, type == "trans")$gene))

filter(Atlantic_TX_eQTLs_filt, type == "cis")
length(unique(filter(Atlantic_TX_eQTLs_filt, type == "cis")$gene))

filter(Atlantic_TX_eQTLs_filt, type == "trans")
length(unique(filter(Atlantic_TX_eQTLs_filt, type == "trans")$gene))

       
```

# now looking at intersection of eQTLs btwn habitats 
```{r intersections of eQTLs }

# intersection by habitat, cis Atlantic
Atlantic_intersection_cis <- intersect(filter(dplyr::select(Atlantic_MI_eQTLs_filt, -beta, -t.stat, -p.value, -FDR), type == "cis"),
          filter(dplyr::select(Atlantic_TX_eQTLs_filt, -beta, -t.stat, -p.value, -FDR), type == "cis"))

length(unique(Atlantic_intersection_cis$gene))

# intersection by habitat, trans Atlantic
Atlantic_intersection_trans <- intersect(filter(dplyr::select(Atlantic_MI_eQTLs_filt, -beta, -t.stat, -p.value, -FDR), type == "trans"),
          filter(dplyr::select(Atlantic_TX_eQTLs_filt, -beta, -t.stat, -p.value, -FDR), type == "trans"))

length(unique(Atlantic_intersection_trans$gene))

# intersection by habitat, cis Midwest
Midwest_intersection_cis <- intersect(filter(dplyr::select(Midwest_MI_eQTLs_filt, -beta, -t.stat, -p.value, -FDR), type == "cis"),
          filter(dplyr::select(Midwest_TX_eQTLs_filt, -beta, -t.stat, -p.value, -FDR), type == "cis"))

nrow(Midwest_intersection_cis)
length(unique(Midwest_intersection_cis$gene))

# intersection by habitat, trans Midwest
Midwest_intersection_trans <- intersect(filter(dplyr::select(Midwest_MI_eQTLs_filt, -beta, -t.stat, -p.value, -FDR), type == "trans"),
          filter(dplyr::select(Midwest_TX_eQTLs_filt, -beta, -t.stat, -p.value, -FDR), type == "trans"))

nrow(Midwest_intersection_trans)
length(unique(Midwest_intersection_trans$gene))


# intersection by habitat, cis Gulf
Gulf_intersection_cis <- intersect(filter(dplyr::select(Gulf_MI_eQTLs_filt, -beta, -t.stat, -p.value, -FDR), type == "cis"),
          filter(dplyr::select(Gulf_TX_eQTLs_filt, -beta, -t.stat, -p.value, -FDR), type == "cis"))

nrow(Gulf_intersection_cis)
length(unique(Gulf_intersection_cis$gene))

# intersection by habitat, trans Gulf
Gulf_intersection_trans <- intersect(filter(dplyr::select(Gulf_MI_eQTLs_filt, -beta, -t.stat, -p.value, -FDR), type == "trans"),
          filter(dplyr::select(Gulf_TX_eQTLs_filt, -beta, -t.stat, -p.value, -FDR), type == "trans"))

nrow(Gulf_intersection_trans)
length(unique(Gulf_intersection_trans$gene))

```

# investigating intersection of eQTLs between populations 

# Gulf Atlantic comparisons 
```{r Atlantic Gulf comparisons}

# intersection by habitat, cis Atlantic
Atlantic_Gulf_TX_intersection_cis <- intersect(filter(dplyr::select(Gulf_TX_eQTLs_filt, -beta, -t.stat, -p.value, -FDR), type == "cis"),
          filter(dplyr::select(Atlantic_TX_eQTLs_filt, -beta, -t.stat, -p.value, -FDR), type == "cis"))

          filter(dplyr::select(Atlantic_TX_eQTLs_filt, -beta, -t.stat, -p.value, -FDR), type == "trans"))

length(unique(Gulf_Midwest_MI_intersection_trans$gene))
```

# make lists of those intersected genes 
```{r intersection gene lists}
# compiling and writing the list of intersection genes 
Atlantic_universal_genes <- rbind(Atlantic_intersection_cis, Atlantic_intersection_trans)
Atlantic_universal_genes$presence <- "TX_and_MI"

Gulf_universal_genes <- rbind(Gulf_intersection_cis, Gulf_intersection_trans)
Gulf_universal_genes$presence <- "TX_and_MI"

Midwest_universal_genes <- rbind(Midwest_intersection_cis, Midwest_intersection_trans)
Midwest_universal_genes$presence <- "TX_and_MI"


# now getting the set diff for each (Present ONLY in one habitat but not the others)

# doing a little setup to make this less cumbersome 

# Gulf
Gulf_MI_trans <- filter(dplyr::select(Gulf_MI_eQTLs_filt, -beta, -t.stat, -p.value, -FDR), type == "trans")
Gulf_MI_cis <- filter(dplyr::select(Gulf_MI_eQTLs_filt, -beta, -t.stat, -p.value, -FDR), type == "cis")
Gulf_TX_trans <- filter(dplyr::select(Gulf_TX_eQTLs_filt, -beta, -t.stat, -p.value, -FDR), type == "trans")
Gulf_TX_cis <- filter(dplyr::select(Gulf_TX_eQTLs_filt, -beta, -t.stat, -p.value, -FDR), type == "cis")

# Atlantic
Atlantic_MI_trans <- filter(dplyr::select(Atlantic_MI_eQTLs_filt, -beta, -t.stat, -p.value, -FDR), type == "trans")
Atlantic_MI_cis <- filter(dplyr::select(Atlantic_MI_eQTLs_filt, -beta, -t.stat, -p.value, -FDR), type == "cis")
Atlantic_TX_trans <- filter(dplyr::select(Atlantic_TX_eQTLs_filt, -beta, -t.stat, -p.value, -FDR), type == "trans")
Atlantic_TX_cis <- filter(dplyr::select(Atlantic_TX_eQTLs_filt, -beta, -t.stat, -p.value, -FDR), type == "cis")

# Midwest
Midwest_MI_trans <- filter(dplyr::select(Midwest_MI_eQTLs_filt, -beta, -t.stat, -p.value, -FDR), type == "trans")
Midwest_MI_cis <- filter(dplyr::select(Midwest_MI_eQTLs_filt, -beta, -t.stat, -p.value, -FDR), type == "cis")
Midwest_TX_trans <- filter(dplyr::select(Midwest_TX_eQTLs_filt, -beta, -t.stat, -p.value, -FDR), type == "trans")
Midwest_TX_cis <- filter(dplyr::select(Midwest_TX_eQTLs_filt, -beta, -t.stat, -p.value, -FDR), type == "cis")

# Gulf

# MI only
# now making the unique lists
MIonly_Gulf_trans <- setdiff(Gulf_MI_trans, Gulf_TX_trans)
MIonly_Gulf_cis <- setdiff(Gulf_MI_cis, Gulf_TX_cis)

# adding a label column 
MIonly_Gulf_trans$presence <- "MI_only"
MIonly_Gulf_cis$presence <- "MI_only"

# TX only
# now making the unique lists
TXonly_Gulf_trans <- setdiff(Gulf_TX_trans, Gulf_MI_trans)
TXonly_Gulf_cis <- setdiff(Gulf_TX_cis, Gulf_MI_cis)

# adding a label column 
TXonly_Gulf_trans$presence <- "TX_only"
TXonly_Gulf_cis$presence <- "TX_only"

# bind 'em
Gulf_presence_labeled <- rbind(MIonly_Gulf_trans,
      MIonly_Gulf_cis,
      TXonly_Gulf_trans,
      TXonly_Gulf_cis,
      Gulf_universal_genes)


# Atlantic

# MI only
# now making the unique lists
MIonly_Atlantic_trans <- setdiff(Atlantic_MI_trans, Atlantic_TX_trans)
MIonly_Atlantic_cis <- setdiff(Atlantic_MI_cis, Atlantic_TX_cis)

# adding a label column 
MIonly_Atlantic_trans$presence <- "MI_only"
MIonly_Atlantic_cis$presence <- "MI_only"

# TX only
# now making the unique lists
TXonly_Atlantic_trans <- setdiff(Atlantic_TX_trans, Atlantic_MI_trans)
TXonly_Atlantic_cis <- setdiff(Atlantic_TX_cis, Atlantic_MI_cis)

# adding a label column 
TXonly_Atlantic_trans$presence <- "TX_only"
TXonly_Atlantic_cis$presence <- "TX_only"

# bind 'em
Atlantic_presence_labeled <- rbind(MIonly_Atlantic_trans,
      MIonly_Atlantic_cis,
      TXonly_Atlantic_trans,
      TXonly_Atlantic_cis,
      Atlantic_universal_genes)

# Midwest

# MI only
# now making the unique lists
MIonly_Midwest_trans <- setdiff(Midwest_MI_trans, Midwest_TX_trans)
MIonly_Midwest_cis <- setdiff(Midwest_MI_cis, Midwest_TX_cis)

# adding a label column 
MIonly_Midwest_trans$presence <- "MI_only"
MIonly_Midwest_cis$presence <- "MI_only"

# TX only
# now making the unique lists
TXonly_Midwest_trans <- setdiff(Midwest_TX_trans, Midwest_MI_trans)
TXonly_Midwest_cis <- setdiff(Midwest_TX_cis, Midwest_MI_cis)

# adding a label column 
TXonly_Midwest_trans$presence <- "TX_only"
TXonly_Midwest_cis$presence <- "TX_only"

# bind 'em
Midwest_presence_labeled <- rbind(MIonly_Midwest_trans,
      MIonly_Midwest_cis,
      TXonly_Midwest_trans,
      TXonly_Midwest_cis,
      Midwest_universal_genes)
```

# combine habitats and plot 

```{r plotting but combining habitats}
ggplot(Midwest_presence_labeled,
       aes(y = as.numeric(s1)/1000000,
           x = as.numeric(genome_bp)/1000000,
           col = presence)) + #alpha = -log10(p.value))) +
  facet_grid(chr ~ genome_Chrom,
             scale = "free",
             space = "free") + 
  theme_bw() +
  theme(strip.background = element_rect(fill="white"),
        panel.spacing = unit(0, "lines"),
        #legend.position = "none",
        panel.grid = element_blank()) +
  geom_point() +
  ggtitle("Midwest eQTLs") +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("dodgerblue",
                     "black",
                     "red"))

ggplot(Atlantic_presence_labeled,
       aes(y = as.numeric(s1)/1000000,
           x = as.numeric(genome_bp)/1000000,
           col = presence)) + #alpha = -log10(p.value))) +
  facet_grid(chr ~ genome_Chrom,
             scale = "free",
             space = "free") + 
  theme_bw() +
  theme(strip.background = element_rect(fill="white"),
        panel.spacing = unit(0, "lines"),
        #legend.position = "none",
        panel.grid = element_blank()) +
  geom_point() +
  ggtitle("Atlantic eQTLs") +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("dodgerblue",
                     "black",
                     "red"))

nrow(filter(Midwest_presence_labeled, 
            presence == "TX_and_MI"))
nrow(filter(Midwest_presence_labeled, 
            presence == "TX_only"))
nrow(filter(Midwest_presence_labeled, 
            presence == "MI_only"))

# writing the labeled csvs 
write.csv(Atlantic_presence_labeled, 
          "~/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/Atlantic_eQTLs_bothHabs.csv")

write.csv(Gulf_presence_labeled, 
          "~/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/Gulf_eQTLs_bothHabs.csv")

write.csv(Midwest_presence_labeled, 
          "~/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/eQTL_output/Midwest_eQTLs_bothHabs.csv")

# scanning for trans eQTLs 

```{r trans hotspots}

# summarizing num of trans eQTLs across the genome 

# Atlantic trans summary
Atlantic_transHot <- (filter(Atlantic_presence_labeled,
       type == "trans") %>% 
  group_by(genome_bp,
           genome_Chrom,
           presence) %>% 
  summarise(n = n()))

# Gulf trans summary
Gulf_transHot <- (filter(Gulf_presence_labeled,
       type == "trans") %>% 
  group_by(genome_bp,
           genome_Chrom,
           presence) %>% 
  summarise(n = n()))

# Midwest trans summary
Midwest_transHot <- (filter(Midwest_presence_labeled,
       type == "trans") %>% 
  group_by(genome_bp,
           genome_Chrom,
           presence) %>% 
  summarise(n = n()))

# SFS investigations 
```{r read in site frequency spectrum of all the SNPs}

# read in the site frequency spectrum for Gulf, Atlantic, Midwest 

Gulf <- read.csv("~/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/SFS/Gulf.frq",
         sep = "\t",
         row.names = NULL)

Atlantic <- read.csv("~/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/SFS/Atlantic.frq",
                 sep = "\t",
                 row.names = NULL)

Midwest <- read.csv("~/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/SFS/Midwest.frq",
                 sep = "\t",
                 row.names = NULL)


# folding for all Atlantic SNPs 
Atlantic_greater <- filter(Atlantic, X.FREQ. >= 0.5) 
Atlantic_less <- filter(Atlantic, X.FREQ. < 0.5) 
Atlantic_greater <- mutate(Atlantic_greater, freq_folded = 1 - Atlantic_greater$X.FREQ.)
Atlantic_less <- mutate(Atlantic_less, freq_folded = Atlantic_less$X.FREQ.)
Atlantic_folded <- rbind(Atlantic_greater, Atlantic_less)


# folding for all Gulf SNPs 
Gulf_greater <- filter(Gulf, X.FREQ. >= 0.5) 
Gulf_less <- filter(Gulf, X.FREQ. < 0.5) 
Gulf_greater <- mutate(Gulf_greater, freq_folded = 1 - Gulf_greater$X.FREQ.)
Gulf_less <- mutate(Gulf_less, freq_folded = Gulf_less$X.FREQ.)
Gulf_folded <- rbind(Gulf_greater, Gulf_less)


# folding for all Midwest SNPs 
Midwest_greater <- filter(Midwest, X.FREQ. >= 0.5) 
Midwest_less <- filter(Midwest, X.FREQ. < 0.5) 
Midwest_greater <- mutate(Midwest_greater, freq_folded = 1 - Midwest_greater$X.FREQ.)
Midwest_less <- mutate(Midwest_less, freq_folded = Midwest_less$X.FREQ.)
Midwest_folded <- rbind(Midwest_greater, Midwest_less)

# label so there are column names in common

Atlantic_folded$genome_Chrom <- Atlantic_folded$row.names
Atlantic_folded$genome_bp <- Atlantic_folded$CHROM

Gulf_folded$genome_Chrom <- Gulf_folded$row.names
Gulf_folded$genome_bp <- Gulf_folded$CHROM

Midwest_folded$genome_Chrom <- Midwest_folded$row.names
Midwest_folded$genome_bp <- Midwest_folded$CHROM

```

# SFS merging / plotting
```{r merge and plot}

Gulf_MI_SFS <- merge(Gulf_MI_eQTLs_filt, Gulf_folded)
Gulf_TX_SFS <- merge(Gulf_TX_eQTLs_filt, Gulf_folded)
Atlantic_MI_SFS <- merge(Atlantic_MI_eQTLs_filt, Gulf_folded)
Atlantic_TX_SFS <- merge(Atlantic_TX_eQTLs_filt, Gulf_folded)
Midwest_MI_SFS <- merge(Midwest_MI_eQTLs_filt, Gulf_folded)
Midwest_TX_SFS <- merge(Midwest_TX_eQTLs_filt, Gulf_folded)


# Atlantic MI 
Atlantic_MI_sfsPlot <- ggplot(Atlantic_MI_SFS,
       aes(x = freq_folded)) + 
  geom_histogram(bins=10,
                 fill = "white",
                 col = "black") + 
  facet_wrap(~type,
             scales = "free", nrow=2, strip.position = "left") + 
  theme_bw() + 
  ggtitle("MI eQTLs, Atlantic") + 
  geom_vline(data=filter(Atlantic_MI_SFS, type == "trans"), aes(xintercept=.18), colour="red", linewidth = 1) + 
  geom_vline(data=filter(Atlantic_MI_SFS, type == "cis"), aes(xintercept=.22), colour="red", linewidth = 1) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        title = element_text(size = 9))

# Atlantic TX 
Atlantic_TX_sfsPlot <- ggplot(Atlantic_TX_SFS,
       aes(x = freq_folded)) + 
  geom_histogram(bins=10,
                 fill = "white",
                 col = "black") + 
  facet_wrap(~type,
             scales = "free", nrow=2, strip.position = "left") + 
  theme_bw() + 
  ggtitle("TX eQTLs, Atlantic") + 
  geom_vline(data=filter(Atlantic_MI_SFS, type == "trans"), aes(xintercept=.19), colour="red", linewidth = 1) + 
  geom_vline(data=filter(Atlantic_MI_SFS, type == "cis"), aes(xintercept=.23), colour="red", linewidth = 1) +
  theme(axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        title = element_text(size = 9))

# Gulf MI 
Gulf_MI_sfsPlot <- ggplot(Gulf_MI_SFS,
       aes(x = freq_folded)) + 
  geom_histogram(bins=10,
                 fill = "white",
                 col = "black") + 
  facet_wrap(~type,
             scales = "free", nrow=2, strip.position = "left") + 
  theme_bw() + 
  ggtitle("MI eQTLs, Gulf") + 
  geom_vline(data=filter(Gulf_MI_SFS, type == "trans"), aes(xintercept=.21), colour="red", linewidth = 1) + 
  geom_vline(data=filter(Gulf_MI_SFS, type == "cis"), aes(xintercept=.26), colour="red", linewidth = 1) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        title = element_text(size = 9))

# Gulf TX 
Gulf_TX_sfsPlot <- ggplot(Gulf_TX_SFS,
       aes(x = freq_folded)) + 
  geom_histogram(bins=10,
                 fill = "white",
                 col = "black") + 
  facet_wrap(~type,
             scales = "free", nrow=2, strip.position = "left") + 
  theme_bw() + 
  ggtitle("TX eQTLs, Gulf") + 
  geom_vline(data=filter(Gulf_MI_SFS, type == "trans"), aes(xintercept=.21), colour="red", linewidth = 1) + 
  geom_vline(data=filter(Gulf_MI_SFS, type == "cis"), aes(xintercept=.25), colour="red", linewidth = 1) +
  theme(axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        title = element_text(size = 9))

mean(filter(Atlantic_TX_SFS, type == "cis")$freq_folded)
mean(filter(Atlantic_TX_SFS, type == "trans")$freq_folded)

mean(filter(Gulf_TX_SFS, type == "cis")$freq_folded)
mean(filter(Gulf_TX_SFS, type == "trans")$freq_folded)

mean(filter(Gulf_MI_SFS, type == "cis")$freq_folded)
mean(filter(Gulf_MI_SFS, type == "trans")$freq_folded)

library(gridExtra)

grid.arrange(Gulf_TX_sfsPlot, Gulf_MI_sfsPlot, nrow =1 )

grid.arrange(Atlantic_MI_sfsPlot, Atlantic_TX_sfsPlot,
             Gulf_MI_sfsPlot, Gulf_TX_sfsPlot, nrow =2,
             bottom = "Folded Site Frequency Spectrum")

grid.arrange(Gulf_MI_sfsPlot, Gulf_TX_sfsPlot, nrow =1,
             bottom = "Folded Site Frequency Spectrum")

hist(Gulf_folded$freq_folded)

mean(Gulf_folded$freq_folded)
mean(filter(Gulf_MI_SFS, type == "cis")$freq_folded)
mean(filter(Gulf_MI_SFS, type == "trans")$freq_folded)


mean(Gulf_folded$freq_folded)
mean(filter(Gulf_TX_SFS, type == "cis")$freq_folded)
mean(filter(Gulf_TX_SFS, type == "trans")$freq_folded)

mean(Atlantic_folded$freq_folded)
mean(filter(Atlantic_TX_SFS, type == "cis")$freq_folded)
mean(filter(Atlantic_TX_SFS, type == "trans")$freq_folded)

# Tajima's D merging / plotting 

```{r Tajima's D comparisons }
# read in Tajima's D
Atlantic_TajD <- read.csv("~/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/genotypes/Atlantic.Tajima.D", sep = "\t")
Midwest_TajD <- read.csv("~/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/genotypes/Midwest.Tajima.D", sep = "\t")
Gulf_TajD <- read.csv("~/Dropbox/LowryLab/data/genotypes/Gulf.Tajima.D", sep = "\t")

Gulf_TajD

Gulf_MI_SFS <- merge(Gulf_MI_eQTLs_filt, Gulf_folded)
Gulf_TX_SFS <- merge(Gulf_TX_eQTLs_filt, Gulf_folded)
Atlantic_MI_SFS <- merge(Atlantic_MI_eQTLs_filt, Gulf_folded)
Atlantic_TX_SFS <- merge(Atlantic_TX_eQTLs_filt, Gulf_folded)
Midwest_MI_SFS <- merge(Midwest_MI_eQTLs_filt, Gulf_folded)
Midwest_TX_SFS <- merge(Midwest_TX_eQTLs_filt, Gulf_folded)

Gulf_MI_eQTLs_filt

# road block -- need to figure out how to merge bins with SNPs 
```


```
